subject: Reducing manual work across your PM and HOA divisions
body:
Hi,

I noticed HomeRiver Group Orlando handles both property management and community association management. That's two separate communication streams, each with their own workflows.

We help multi-division property companies build automated workflows that route inquiries to the right department, send standard responses automatically, and keep owners/tenants updated without manual effort.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Large operation with HOA and property management divisions
Multiple email addresses for different departments
High volume of tenant and owner communications
